text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That was unfortunate... But please don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
While I'd love to encourage you, I'm afraid it's
about time we got going.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Remember this agony and use it to fuel your next
attempt later on.
